sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GOOP Stock Price | Kurv Yield Premium Strategy Google (GOOGL) ETF
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information about the Kurv Yield Premium Strategy Google (GOOGL) ETF (GOOP), including its current stock price, trading exchange (NYSE), and key financial metrics like dividend yield, expense ratio, and assets under management. It also offers a company profile outlining its investment strategy across public equity and fixed income markets, utilizing derivatives and aiming to benchmark against the S&P 500 Total Return Index. The article includes performance data, top holdings, and technical analysis indicators, signaling a "Strong Sell" based on moving averages.

feed.title: Deal Dispatch: Public Storage Buys National Storage For $10.5B, Mastercard Acquires BVNK, Domino's Franchisee Bankruptcy
feed.summary: This "Deal Dispatch" article covers various M&A activities and bankruptcies. Key deals include Public Storage acquiring National Storage Affiliates for $10.5 billion, Mastercard's $1.8 billion acquisition of stablecoin infrastructure startup BVNK, and IBM's $11 billion purchase of Confluent. Several companies, including a Domino's franchise, The Lycra Company, Baker & Taylor, and Blockfills, have filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy.

feed.title: Teradyne Stock: Analysts See More Upside in 2026 After Soaring 242% Last Year
feed.summary: Teradyne (TER) saw its stock surge by 242% last year, driven by significant AI-related revenue growth which reached over 60% in Q4 2025 and is projected at 70% for Q1 2026. The company, a major player in automated chip-testing, particularly for AI accelerators, expects continued strong momentum in 2026, with a long-term target of $6 billion in revenue and EPS of $9.50 to $11.00. While analysts predict modest short-term upside, the TIKR model projects a 43.6% total return through December 2030, anchored by AI demand and strategic ventures.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Secures FDA Nod For Opdivo Plus Chemo For Untreated Hodgkin Lymphoma
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE: BMY) has received FDA approval for Opdivo (nivolumab) combined with chemotherapy for adult and pediatric patients aged 12 and older with previously untreated Stage III or IV classical Hodgkin lymphoma. The approval is based on Study CA209-8UT which showed superior progression-free survival for nivolumab plus AVD. Opdivo generated $5.9 billion in revenues in 2025, and the company's shares were down 1.33% at $57.34 at the time of publication.

feed.title: Becton Dickinson stock faces analyst scrutiny amid earnings anticipation and valuation debates
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (NYSE: BDX) is under analyst scrutiny as it approaches Q2 earnings, with recent strong Q1 2026 results and an average price target

feed.title: Chipotle’s stock is due for a rebound from ‘slop bowl’ malaise
feed.summary: Mizuho analysts on Friday upgraded Chipotle's stock, citing that better days are ahead for the company. They believe a more measured pricing approach, new menu items, and leveraging the high-protein trend will boost sales this year. This upgrade comes after the stock dropped significantly over the past year due to consumer boredom with high-priced "slop bowls."

feed.title: BMO bets on US West branch buildout to chase affluent borrowers
feed.summary: BMO Financial Group is expanding its presence in the US West by planning to open over 130 new financial centers in California and about 15 in Arizona over the next five years. This move, following the sale of branches in other Midwestern and Plains markets, aims to focus on advice-led banking for retail, small business, and wealth clients in growth regions. The expansion, set to create hundreds of jobs, targets affluent households, small businesses, and cross-border Canadians in key markets.

feed.title: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP, a Leading Securities Fraud Law Firm Encourages Gartner, Inc. (IT) Shareholders To Inquire About Securities Fraud Class Action
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (IT) on behalf of investors who purchased shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made materially false and misleading statements regarding its ability to meet revenue targets and maintain contract value growth, which led to significant stock price drops. Shareholders who suffered losses are encouraged to inquire about potentially pursuing claims and have until May 18, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: What triggered Moderna shares' latest price pullback
feed.summary: Moderna (MRNA) shares declined 2.08% to $51.28, experiencing volatility due to ongoing market pressures. Despite positive five-year follow-up data for its cancer vaccine mRNA-4157 and a significant patent settlement, a 33% quarterly revenue drop from reduced COVID-19 vaccine sales, insider selling, and commercialization uncertainties weigh on the stock. Analysts offer mixed views, with some highlighting persistent selling pressure while others point to a strong pipeline and high probability of a near-term rebound.

feed.title: Flowers Foods Hits New 52-Week Low at $8.42 Amidst Declining Sales
feed.summary: Flowers Foods (FMCG sector) has hit a new 52-week low of $8.42, marking a 62.74% stock price decline over the past year. Despite a high dividend yield and low debt, the company has shown modest long-term growth in sales and operating profit, significantly underperforming the S&P 500. Its market capitalization stands at USD 2,035 million with a P/E ratio of 8.00.

feed.title: Forian (Nasdaq:FORA) - Stock Analysis
feed.summary: This Simply Wall St analysis provides an overview of Forian Inc. (FORA), highlighting its current market capitalization of US$63.1 million and a stock price of US$2.05. The report notes the company's strong financial health but points out that it is currently unprofitable and not forecast to become profitable in the next three years. Key takeaways emphasize enhanced healthcare data integration, AI-driven innovation, and strategic acquisitions as drivers for scalability and long-term revenue growth.

feed.title: Paychex Gears Up to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
feed.summary: Paychex (PAYX) is set to release its third-quarter fiscal 2026 results on March 25. The company has a strong record of beating earnings estimates, with an average surprise of 1% over the last four quarters. Analysts predict Q3 revenues of $1.8 billion, an 18.3% increase year-over-year, and earnings of $1.68 per share, up 12.8%.

feed.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Issues Statement
feed.summary: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE:GNK) has issued a statement rejecting Diana's indicative proposal, stating it is "well below Genco's intrinsic value and NAV and fails to provide a premium for control of Genco." The company's Board of Directors asserts its commitment to maximizing shareholder value and remains open to engaging with Diana if an offer appropriately reflects Genco's intrinsic value and upside potential. Genco is advised by Jefferies LLC and legal counsel Herbert Smith Freehills Kramer (US) LLP and Sidley Austin LLP, with Morgan Stanley & Co. LLC acting as special advisor to the Board.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Corteva, Archer Daniels Midland, The Scotts Miracle-Gro, Adecoagro S.A. and Mission Produce
feed.summary: The Zacks Agriculture – Operations industry faces ongoing challenges such as volatile commodity prices, high input costs, and trade uncertainties, which compress margins and impact productivity. Despite these hurdles, the long-term outlook remains positive due to innovation in seeds and food processing, rising demand for healthy and sustainable food, and growth in alternative proteins and emerging markets. Key players like Corteva, Archer Daniels Midland, The Scotts Miracle-Gro, Adecoagro S.A., and Mission Produce are strategically positioned to leverage these trends and navigate market volatility.

feed.title: Why Is Analog Devices (ADI) Down 10.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) shares have dropped 10.1% since its last earnings report, underperforming the S&P 500. Despite this, the company's Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings beat estimates, with revenues rising 30% year-over-year. Analysts have shown an upward trend in estimates, leading to Analog Devices holding a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), suggesting an above-average return is expected.

feed.title: Bel Fuse, TopBuild, First Solar, APi, and Owens Corning Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Bel Fuse, TopBuild, First Solar, APi, and Owens Corning significantly dropped following heightened geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, which led to concerns about increased inflation and a potential economic slowdown. Rising energy prices, stemming from the conflict involving the U.S., Israel, and Iran, are impacting industrial and materials companies by driving up operational costs. This negative market sentiment is particularly challenging for cyclical sectors, with investors now weighing these geopolitical risks while the broader Wall Street market faces its fourth consecutive weekly loss amidst inflation concerns.

feed.title: 10 Consumer Discretionary Stocks Whale Activity In Today's Session
feed.summary: This article identifies significant "whale activity" in the options market for ten consumer discretionary stocks, including Amazon.com, Alibaba, and Tesla. It details specific call and put option trades with their associated sentiment, expiration dates, strike prices, and total trade values. The activity is tracked using Benzinga's options activity scanner, highlighting potential trading opportunities for those monitoring large-scale transactions.

feed.title: FormFactor, Western Digital, IPG Photonics, and Vishay Intertechnology Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Several semiconductor stocks, including FormFactor, Western Digital, IPG Photonics, and Vishay Intertechnology, experienced declines following charges against a Super Micro Computer co-founder for smuggling AI chips to China. This event caused broader anxiety in the AI semiconductor industry and intensified a downturn in the Nasdaq. Investors are now evaluating whether this market overreaction could present purchasing opportunities for high-quality stocks.

feed.title: Genco board says Diana offer is too low to win control
feed.summary: Genco Shipping & Trading (NYSE: GNK) has rejected an indicative acquisition proposal from Diana, stating it is below the company's intrinsic value and net asset value (NAV) and lacks a control premium. While the board is committed to maximizing shareholder value and remains open to engagement, they will only consider an offer that appropriately reflects Genco's true worth and upside potential. The company has retained financial and legal advisors, including Jefferies LLC and Herbert Smith Freehills Kramer, to assist in this process.

feed.title: Why Graphic Packaging Holding (GPK) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
feed.summary: Graphic Packaging Holding (GPK) stock fell 3.7% today after RBC Capital lowered its price target from $13 to $10, while maintaining a "Sector Perform" rating. This significant cut in the price target signals analyst concerns about the company's future earnings or growth potential, prompting investors to sell shares. The stock has been highly volatile, down 40.5% year-to-date and 65.7% from its 52-week high, with broader market fears of resurgent inflation and rising crude oil prices also impacting investor sentiment.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Recommends Blackstone Over Blue Owl Capital
feed.summary: Jim Cramer recommends Blackstone (NYSE:BX) over Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE:OWL) due to concerns about Blue Owl's private equity and private credit operations, particularly regarding redemption issues with one of its business development companies (BDCs). Cramer highlighted problems with Blue Owl Capital II, including redemption limits and a controversial merger plan that was later scrapped, followed by a new plan involving asset sales and altered redemption handling. He sees Blue Owl as a potential "canary in the coal mine" for the private equity sector, suggesting Blackstone is a better-run alternative.

feed.title: MetLife Inc. stock draws investor interest as AIA Group boosts stake amid strong analyst outlook
feed.summary: MetLife Inc. is gaining investor interest after AIA Group Ltd acquired 16,288 shares, reflecting confidence in the insurer's stability and growth. Analysts forecast a 20% upside for the stock, coupled with a robust dividend, making it an attractive option for DACH investors seeking portfolio diversification. The company's strong financial performance, operational resilience across diverse segments, and strategic investments in digital tools and Asia expansion further support its positive outlook amidst market volatility.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock (NYSE: SW) officer awarded RSUs, small tax withholding
feed.summary: Alvaro Henao, an officer at Smurfit Westrock plc, reported receiving 223 restricted stock units and 57 ordinary shares, with 8 ordinary shares withheld for tax obligations on dividend-equivalent vesting. Following these transactions, Henao directly holds 72,644 ordinary shares and 19,272 restricted stock units, which are scheduled to vest in February 2027. This activity reflects routine equity compensation and tax compliance.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock (SW) officer awarded RSUs with small tax share withholding
feed.summary: Laurent Sellier, an officer at Smurfit Westrock plc, reported receiving routine equity compensation including 225 Ordinary Shares and 358 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as dividend equivalents. A small portion of shares (30 Ordinary Shares) were withheld for tax obligations, a non-market transaction. Following these transactions, Sellier directly owns 138,188 Ordinary Shares and holds 30,972 restricted stock units, with an additional 3,188 Ordinary Shares held indirectly.

feed.title: [Form 4] Smurfit Westrock plc Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: The article details a Form 4 filing for Smurfit Westrock plc regarding insider trading activity by President and Group CEO Anthony P.J. Smurfit. The filing reports routine equity compensation, including restricted stock units as dividend equivalents and a grant of ordinary shares. It also notes shares withheld for tax obligations, emphasizing that these were not open-market sales, and outlines Smurfit's current holdings.

feed.title: US FDA approves Bristol Myers Squibb’s cancer drug for Hodgkin’s lymphoma
feed.summary: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration has approved Bristol Myers Squibb’s combination treatment, Opdivo, for adults and adolescents aged 12 and older with previously untreated Stage III or IV classical Hodgkin’s lymphoma. This new regimen combines Opdivo with doxorubicin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine, providing a new frontline option for advanced-stage disease. Opdivo is also approved for other advanced cancers like melanoma, non-small cell lung cancer, and kidney cancer.

feed.title: Abbott expects to close on acquisition of Madison’s Exact Sciences on Monday
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories is set to finalize its $23 billion acquisition of Madison-based Exact Sciences on Monday after receiving all necessary regulatory approvals. This deal will allow Abbott to enter the cancer screening market with Exact Sciences' well-known Cologuard test. A recent UW-Madison report highlighted Exact Sciences' significant economic impact, employing approximately 3,600 people in Wisconsin and contributing up to $7 billion to the state's GDP.

feed.title: Bel Fuse, TopBuild, First Solar, APi, and Owens Corning Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Bel Fuse, TopBuild, First Solar, APi, and Owens Corning experienced significant drops due to heightened geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, leading to concerns about inflation and an economic slowdown. The surge in energy prices, driven by the U.S., Israel, and Iran conflict, is increasing costs for industrial and materials companies, negatively impacting cyclical sectors. Investors are wary of sustained high oil prices complicating the economic outlook, and the broader market is heading for a fourth consecutive weekly loss amidst these geopolitical risks.

feed.title: Ball Corp (BALL) Shares Gap Down to $57.375 on Mar 20
feed.summary: Shares of Ball Corp (BALL) gapped down to $57.375 on March 20, representing a 2.74% drop in mid-day trading. Despite the dip, analysts predict an average target price of $70.86, suggesting a 23.50% upside, and GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $74.57, indicating a 29.97% upside. The stock currently holds an "Outperform" status based on consensus brokerage recommendations.

feed.title: General Motors (GM) Moves to Boost its Dealers’ Used-car Operations
feed.summary: General Motors (GM) is changing its used-vehicle sales strategy in the U.S. to better compete with online retailers like Carvana. The company will discontinue its certified pre-owned program for most models and require Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealers to use its CarBravo platform, which launched in 2023. This move aims to improve used-vehicle flow through its network and expand inventory to include non-GM models, capitalizing on the high demand for used cars due to affordability concerns.

feed.title: Dividend-linked RSUs lift Smurfit Westrock (SW) director holdings
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc director Irial Finan was granted 80 ordinary-share equivalent restricted stock units (RSUs) as a compensation-related award, which accrued as dividend equivalents from a quarterly dividend. This transaction, detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing, increases Finan's total holdings to 55,180 ordinary shares, including 6,949 RSUs set to vest by May 2, 2026, or the next annual meeting. The RSUs represent an equity compensation, not an open-market purchase, and are tied to the same terms as the underlying award.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock (SW) director gets 51 restricted stock units as dividend equivalents
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc director Lourdes Melgar received 51 restricted stock units as dividend equivalents from a quarterly dividend of $0.4523 per share, increasing her total holdings to 6,230 ordinary shares. These new units are subject to the same terms as her existing restricted stock unit awards. The filing confirms this was a compensation-related grant, not an open-market transaction.

feed.title: Scotiabank seeks to increase KeyCorp stake
feed.summary: Scotiabank is looking to raise its ownership in KeyCorp from 14.99% to nearly 19.99% by acquiring more voting shares. This move follows KeyCorp's announcement of a $1 billion share-repurchase program and does not signal a change in the relationship between the two banks. Scotiabank initially invested in KeyCorp in December 2024, acquiring approximately 14.9% of common stock for $2.8 billion, at a time when US regional banks were bolstering their capital.

feed.title: Ford Motor Company (F) Announces New AI to Grow Multibillion-dollar Pro Commercial Division
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company has introduced "Ford Pro AI" to expand its commercial vehicle business, which generated $66 billion in revenue and $6.8 billion in earnings last year. This AI system analyzes over 1 billion daily data points from connected vehicles to help its 840,000 paid Pro subscribers improve productivity and minimize downtime. The initiative, developed on Google Cloud, aligns with CEO Jim Farley's strategy to diversify revenue through digital services.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock (SW) director Carol Fairweather awarded 51 RSUs as dividend equivalents
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc director Carol Fairweather was granted 51 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 18, 2026, as dividend equivalents tied to a quarterly dividend. These RSUs, which convert into ordinary shares, were part of her compensation and increased her direct holdings to 9,230 ordinary shares. The filing specifies that 4,422 of her RSUs are scheduled to vest on the earlier of May 2, 2026, or the next annual meeting of stockholders.

feed.title: Aptiv Announces Pricing Terms of Cash Tender Offer
feed.summary: Aptiv PLC has announced the pricing terms for its cash tender offer to purchase outstanding notes, with an aggregate consideration of up to $1,371,000,000. The total consideration for each series of notes includes an Early Tender Premium, and the tender offer is subject to conditions including the consummation of the previously announced separation of Aptiv’s Electrical Distribution Systems business into a new company, Versigent, and a special dividend from Versigent. The offer is set to expire on April 3, 2026.

feed.title: Just 13 industrial manufacturers made this ethics list. Eaton did
feed.summary: Eaton (NYSE: ETN) has been recognized for the 15th time as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies by Ethisphere, a global leader in ethical business practices. Eaton is one of only 13 honorees in the industrial manufacturing category, underscoring its long-standing commitment to embedding ethics into its decision-making processes. This honor reflects Eaton's dedication to fostering a culture where ethics is a priority, contributing to its sustained growth and reliable outcomes for customers and communities.

feed.title: Eaton Recognized for the 15th Time as One of the World’s Most Ethical Companies®
feed.summary: Eaton has been recognized for the 15th time as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies by Ethisphere, a global leader in ethical business practices. The company, an intelligent power management firm with $27.4 billion in revenues in 2025, was one of 13 honorees in the industrial manufacturing category. This repeated recognition highlights Eaton's sustained commitment to ethics, integrity, and fostering a culture where employees are empowered to act ethically, demonstrating how strong ethical practices correlate with outperforming peers.

feed.title: Has Brown & Brown (BRO) Fallen Too Far After Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) has experienced a significant share price pullback, declining 44.0% over the last year, prompting a re-evaluation of its fair value. While an Excess Returns analysis suggests a 53.1% undervaluation with an intrinsic value of $141.82 per share, its current P/E ratio of 21.7x is above Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 14.9x, indicating it might be overvalued by this metric. The article encourages investors to analyze different valuation approaches and leverage community narratives for a comprehensive understanding.

feed.title: Is Union Pacific (UNP) Offering An Opportunity After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Union Pacific (UNP) has experienced recent share price weakness, with declines of 4.1% over the last 7 days and 10.9% over the past 30 days, despite multi-year gains. Simply Wall St's valuation model suggests the stock is currently undervalued, with a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis indicating it's 25.1% below its intrinsic value and a P/E ratio analysis also showing it's undervalued compared to its "Fair Ratio." The article encourages investors to use Simply Wall St's "Narratives" feature to build personalized valuation models based on their own forecasts.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock (SW) director gains 51 dividend-equivalent share units
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc director Terrell K. Crews was granted 51 ordinary shares at no cost, which are classified as dividend equivalent restricted stock units. This grant increased his direct holdings to 32,483 ordinary shares, including 4,422 restricted stock units set to vest by May 2, 2026, or the next annual meeting. Additionally, Crews indirectly holds 22,635 ordinary shares through a trust.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider ConocoPhillips (COP) After Its Strong Recent Share Price Run?
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) has seen a strong share price run recently, with returns of 4.8% over 7 days, 15.8% over 30 days, 30.3% year to date, and 27.4% over the past year. Despite this, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock might be undervalued by 53.0% at its current price of US$126, with an estimated intrinsic value of $268.30 per share. Additionally, its current P/E ratio of 19.3x is below Simply Wall St’s “Fair Ratio” of 24.8x, further indicating potential undervaluation.

feed.title: Deadline Approaching: Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. (GO) Shareholders Who Lost Money Urged To Contact Law Offices of Howard G. Smith
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Howard G. Smith are urging shareholders of Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. (GO) who suffered losses to contact them regarding an upcoming lead plaintiff deadline of May 15, 2026. This pertains to a securities fraud lawsuit filed against the company for allegedly making misleading statements between August 5, 2025, and March 4, 2026. The lawsuit claims Grocery Outlet expanded too rapidly, which led to missing financial guidance, initiating an "optimization plan" on top of a "restructuring plan," closing 36 underperforming stores, and taking an impairment charge of $110 million, resulting in a significant stock price drop.

feed.title: Director at Smurfit Westrock (SW) receives 51-share equity grant in Form 4
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc director Timothy J. Bernlohr received 51 ordinary shares on March 18, 2026, as part of a grant-type award. These shares were issued at $0.00 each, accruing as dividend equivalents on an existing restricted stock unit award. Following this transaction, Bernlohr directly holds 55,205 ordinary shares, including 4,422 restricted stock units set to vest by May 2, 2026, or the next annual meeting.

feed.title: ONEOK upped to Buy at Jefferies as war duration lifts odds of higher structural crude risk premium
feed.summary: Jefferies has upgraded ONEOK (OKE) shares to Buy from Hold, increasing its price target to $98 from $80. The upgrade comes as the firm believes the risk-reward for the oil and gas midstream operator has become asymmetric in the stock's favor, citing that heightened crude risk premium due to ongoing geopolitical conflict is beneficial for ONEOK. Following the upgrade, ONEOK's stock rose 3% in Friday's trading.

feed.title: Wells Fargo’s Board Wrongly Gave Scharf the Keys to His Own Oversight
feed.summary: The article criticizes Wells Fargo's board for appointing CEO Charles Scharf as chairman in October 2025 and increasing his compensation to $94.52 million, arguing this demonstrates a lack of independent oversight. The National Legal and Policy Center (NLPC) urges shareholders to vote for Item 5 at the upcoming annual meeting, which would require an independent Chairman of the Board, citing concerns over the company's financial performance, regulatory issues, and abandonment of prior commitments under Scharf's leadership. The NLPC emphasizes that Wells Fargo's performance trails competitors and calls for a return to its previous bylaws mandating an independent chair to restore accountability.

feed.title: GeoPark (NYSE: GPRK) director reports 101,110 common shares in initial Form 3
feed.summary: GeoPark Ltd director Constantin Papadimitriou has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership (Form 3) disclosing direct ownership of 101,110 common shares, each with a par value of US$0.001. This filing establishes his current ownership position as an insider and does not report any recent purchases or sales. The Form 3 indicates his relationship to the issuer as a Director and the event triggering the statement was on March 18, 2026.

feed.title: Braves' 2026 home opener will air free across the Southeast
feed.summary: Gray Media and the Atlanta Braves will simulcast the Braves' 2026 home opener against the Kansas City Royals on March 27, 2026, across BravesVision and Gray Media local stations. This free over-the-air broadcast aims to make the game accessible to fans throughout the Southeast, celebrating 60 years of Braves baseball in Atlanta with pregame festivities beginning at 4:00 p.m. ET. Following the announcement, Gray Media's stock (GTN) experienced a moderate positive market reaction, gaining 4.10%.

feed.title: Extreme wins first EPEAT registry for network gear
feed.summary: Extreme Networks has become the first networking vendor to achieve EPEAT registry status for its switches and access points, including the 5420 Series switches and AP4020 Wi-Fi 7 access points. This recognition, managed by the Global Electronics Council, provides an environmental certification important for procurement, especially in sectors with sustainability requirements. The company sees this as a new industry standard, helping customers meet sustainability mandates and carbon-reduction goals while strengthening Extreme's corporate responsibility objectives.

feed.title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Friday's Intraday Session
feed.summary: This article lists 12 industrial stocks experiencing significant movement during Friday's intraday session, categorizing them as gainers or losers. Notable gainers include York Space Systems, Roma Green Finance, and Planet Labs, with several reporting recent Q4 earnings. Decreases were seen in stocks like Turbo Energy, Green Circle Decarbonize, and FiscalNote Holdings.
